title: Run analysis
subtitle: Search a ticker, choose analysts, then run the research pipeline.

instrument.label: Instrument
instrument.hint: Type a symbol like AAPL or 0700.HK, then pick a listing.

tradeDate.label: Analysis date
tradeDate.hint: Uses the selected market timezone when available (otherwise your account timezone). Cannot be after today.

analystTeamHint: Toggle agents included in this run.

models.label: Analysis models
models.hint: Choose quick and deep models from the same provider.
models.unavailable: No models are open yet. Ask an administrator.

market.title: Market
market.description: Technicals, price action, volume, and momentum.

news.title: News
news.description: Headlines, catalysts, filings, and macro context.

social.title: Social
social.description: Social buzz, crowd positioning, and narrative shift.

submit.estimateUnavailable: Credit estimate is temporarily unavailable. The server will calculate it again when submitted.
submit.errorBody: Check the service connection and retry.

snapshot.title: Market snapshot
snapshot.emptyBody: Quotes and daily moves appear here after you pick a listing.

pipeline.title: Agent activity
pipeline.noEventsBody: Stage updates appear here while a run is processing.
pipeline.stopConfirmBody: The run will end and reserved credits will be released per the failure rules. Stop now?
pipeline.resultSucceededBody: The report is ready. Open it now, or start another run.
pipeline.resultFailedBody: This run did not finish successfully. You can go back and try again.
pipeline.toastStopping: Stop requested. The run will end at the next safe checkpoint.

stageDescriptions.trader: Form a trade plan from the research.
stageDescriptions.risk_review: Aggressive, neutral, and conservative risk debate.
